---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

<!-- 
Thanks for suggesting an idea to make the project better!
Please fill in as much detail as possible — the more context, the easier it is to discuss and implement.
Remove any sections that don't apply.
-->

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.  
Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "It takes too many steps to [...]"

### Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.  
- What should the new feature do?  
- How should users interact with it?  
- Any specific UI/UX preferences?

### Describe alternatives you've considered

Any other solutions or workarounds you've thought about (or are currently using).

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

- Use case / user story:  
  As a [type of user], I want [some goal] so that [some reason/benefit].

- Examples of similar features in other tools/products:  
  (links, names, or brief descriptions are very helpful)

- Rough priority for you (optional):  
  - [ ] Must-have / blocker for my workflow  
  - [ ] High value, would use frequently  
  - [ ] Nice to have  
  - [ ] Just an idea / low priority

- Would you be interested in helping implement this?  
  - [ ] Yes – I can submit a PR  
  - [ ] Maybe – depending on scope  
  - [ ] No – just suggesting

### Mockups / Examples (optional but extremely helpful)

<!-- 
Attach wireframes, screenshots, sketches, or even hand-drawn images.
Links to Figma, Excalidraw, or similar are also great.
-->

### Environment / Context (optional – helps with scoping)

- **App/Version**: <!-- e.g. v2.3.1 or latest main -->
- **Deployment**: <!-- Local / AWS / Vercel / etc. -->
- **Platforms you need this on**: <!-- Web / iOS / Android / Desktop / All -->
- **User type / role** (if applicable): <!-- Admin / Regular user / Guest / etc. -->
